title: Sanctum PvP 16x
description: An Elegant Green Samurai Themed PvP Texture Pack
body:
‎Elegance and style meets practicality as i introduce to you — Sanctum 16x! The 2nd installment of the Euphoria Pack Series. Featuring a green samurai PvP Texture Pack offering your needed pvp necessities such as transparent inventory ui Interface, short swords, low fire, outlined ores, and more! While looking elegant and clean at the same time.
‎
‎
Made by Shadow Eagle and Eryndor Pixels.
